title: REPO Heads
description: Client-sided voice chat integration for R.E.P.O.-styled eye & mouth animations.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ba497ee8b6041dda1752814b4322690a4f3b36b.png) Created for Laf's YouTube channel, there are currently no plans to provide support or update the mod, sorry! R.E.P.O. Heads brings the hilarious head and eye movements from the Steam game R.E.P.O. into Minecraft! If you haven't played R.E.P.O. yet, you should definitely check it out. ## Features - **Volume-based head splitting** - Your head opens and closes based on your sound level. - **R.E.P.O priority eye tracking** - Eyes track movement just like in R.E.P.O. - **Customizable eye positions** - Choose where your eyes appear. - **Adjustable head splitting height** - Set the exact pixel where your head splits. ## Tutorial ## Buttons |Disabled Indicator|Enabled Indicator|Description |:---------------------:|:---------------------:|:---------------------| | ![oho](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c04588845a95c481d3f64092458b99c84c4e274.png) | ![oho](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da25755ccc4fbf7b2be86373b9a4ccd0c5f381e9.png) | Toggle eye & head movement of other players for yourself. | | ![sho](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a82abaf5783aa7fc59780d0fe16fdb2c69e1f620.png) | ![sho](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e2741e3a08a7b43b716622120b5bf36630b1568.png) | Prevent your own eye & head movements from being sent to other players. | ## Eye Selection Menu Select up to `2` eye & pupil locations. Your eyes will follow in-game events in real time. Your eye location defines where your pupils can move to, and your pupils will move during real world events. ## Head Splitting Selection Menu Choose the exact pixel where your head opens and closes. There must be at least one-pixel padding at the top and bottom. Both the eyes & head splitting height are sent with anyone using the mod, allowing you full customization over your appearance! # Frequently Asked Questions
What versions and loaders do you plan to support? For loaders, we plan to support all of the following: Fabric, Forge and NeoForge. And for future versions, we plan to support the latest release at all times, as well as versions down to 1.20. To keep up to date, add the mod to your favorites list and check back every once-in-a-while.
Where can I report an issue? You may report bugs & issues here: https://forms.gle/qCPAtm9HrRYKyRaH7 Do not report known incompatabilities: Fresh Moves Resource Pack, Fresh Animations Resource Pack, The Aether Mod, EmoteCraft, Supplementaries Do not use this for feature requests please.
Do you plan to release the map found in Laf's video? The map has been publicized to supporting Channel Members in laf's Discord. Just note the map does not come with the doors or physics related items.
R.E.P.O. Heads is currently incompatible with: Fresh Moves Resource Pack, Fresh Animations Resource Pack, The Aether Mod, EmoteCraft, Supplementaries, Better Combat, Modular Golems
